chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-11 of 1991 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions For hearing of CMA 5141/2020 09-10-2024 Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for applicant/respondent No.1. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G a/w Zahid Ali Shah, Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Rohri (alleged contemnor No.3) ***** Counsel for applicant/respondent No.1 states that the applicant’s title in the subject land has been proven till the Apex Court, however the alleged contemnor/Assistant Commissioner, Rohri has issued the impugned Notice dated 25.06.2020 to applicant Zahoor Shah (attorney of Syed Rafaqat Hussain Shah) to vacate the subject property. Such notice of the Assistant Commissioner has no documents attached to, and the Assistant Commissioner has ordered to remove the structure within three days, per learned counsel. Today, alleged contemnor No.3 has appeared and files a statement/objections to allege that the applicant is an encroacher. This revelation has seemingly come after four judgments having been passed in favour of the applicant, which does not appeal to a prudent mind. Even the Mukhtiarkar has not brought original record. While we suspend the operation of impugned Notice, let proper comments be filed by the alleged contemnors as well Mukhtiarkar, Rohri to bring original record starting with mother entry before this Court as well as Assistant 2 Commissioner, Rohri be present in the Court on the next date of hearing along with relevant record. Adjourned to 07.11.2024. In the meanwhile, operation of impugned Notice dated 25.06.2020, issued by the Assistant Commissioner, Rohri to remain suspended till the next date of hearing.

Adjourned to 07.11.2024. In the meanwhile, operation of impugned Notice dated 25.06.2020, issued by the Assistant Commissioner, Rohri to remain suspended till the next date of hearing. Office to provide a copy of this order to the office of AAG for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
